body: Consolidate eddy diffusivity logic in `eddy_diffusion_closures.jl` and mass flux logic in `mass_flux_closures.jl`, update buoyancy calculations to be consistent throughout (use geopotential gradient instead of `g` parameter), add helper functions for computing diffusivity/viscosity, adds l_grid to MixingLength output struct. Includes more docstrings and comments.
title: Refactor and document ED pieces
